logic.description: All of the conditions must match (AND condition) or any of them should match (OR condition). Use 'ALL' as default when only conditions OR only baseSegmentIds are present.

baseSegmentIds.description: Base segments to reference and combine with new conditions

logic.description: Logic for combining base segments: ALL (AND), ANY (OR), or EXCLUDE (NOT)

segmentIds.description: Array of segment IDs to reference

left_value.description: left side condition to compare to the right value

anyOf.description: Name of a column of the customers table which is used for attribute condition

operator.description: Comparison operators. REGEX matches a string against a regular expression pattern. NOT REGEX is the negation.

anyOf.description: This is used when the operator is IN. Specify actual data the attribute column has

right_value.description: Right value to compare with the left value. This is used for operators other than 'IS NOT NULL', 'IS NULL', and 'BETWEEN'

min_value.description: Min value used for specifying the range of BETWEEN

max_value.description: Max value used for specifying the range of BETWEEN

reason.description: A reason why this condition is set

left_value.description: Name of a column of the behavior table

operator.description: Comparison operators. TIME WITHIN PAST is time dedicated operator for filtering data within a relative time period. REGEX matches a string against a regular expression pattern.

anyOf.description: This is used when the operator is IN. Specify actual data the attribute column has

right_value.description: Right value to compare with the left value. This is used for operators other than 'IS NOT NULL', 'IS NULL', and 'BETWEEN'

min_value.description: Min value used for specifying the range of BETWEEN

max_value.description: Max value used for specifying the range of BETWEEN

reason.description: A reason why this condition is set

behaviorCondition.description: Aggregated condition used for behavior condition

from.description: The source table name of the SQL statement

aggregation.description: The aggregation condition used for behavior rule

column_name.description: column name to use for this aggregation
column name to use for this aggregation

order_by_column_name.description: column name to use for ordering. Optional for most aggregation types.

filter.description: Filter condition of the behavior data

logic.description: All of the conditions must match (AND condition) or any of them should match (OR condition)

timeWithinPastValue.description: This is used when TIME WITHIN PAST is selected in operator

value.description: A number for the period it's used with 'unit'. If it's 7 days, value is 7 and unit is 'day'

timestamp.description: This is used when the column type is timestamp, in ISO 8601 format

conditionGroup.description: A nested group of conditions with its own logic operator. Use this to create mixed logic expressions like 'A AND (B OR C)'.

logic.description: Logic for combining conditions in this group: ALL (AND) or ANY (OR)

conditions.description: Array of conditions within this group (one level of nesting supported)
